lessons.title: You Are More Than You Think
lessons.description: Affirm your self-worth and discover hidden strengths. Begin to believe in your potential.

instructions.experience: Recall a moment when you helped someone, even in a small way.
instructions.reflection: How did that make you feel? Did you realize you already have influence?
instructions.conceptualization: Understand that small acts reveal hidden strengths.
instructions.experimentation: Write down three personal qualities that could grow into career or enterprise skills.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Self-awareness skills useful in leadership, entrepreneurship, and hobbies like mentoring.
lessons.example: A learner who recognizes their strengths can later lead a team or start an enterprise.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: The Power of Imagination
lessons.description: Discover how imagination fuels innovation and opens doors to future careers.

instructions.experience: Close your eyes and picture yourself five years from now.
instructions.reflection: What role are you playing? Innovator? Entrepreneur? Community leader?
instructions.conceptualization: Dreams are the seeds of reality — imagination fuels innovation.
instructions.experimentation: Create a vision board or sketch of your dream career/enterprise.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Imagination skills useful in creative industries, design, and hobbies like art or storytelling.
lessons.example: A learner who imagines building a digital solution may one day create a startup.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Breaking Limiting Beliefs
lessons.description: Identify and replace limiting beliefs with empowering affirmations.

instructions.experience: Write down one negative thought you’ve had about yourself.
instructions.reflection: Where did it come from? How has it held you back?
instructions.conceptualization: Recognize that beliefs are not facts — they can be rewritten.
instructions.experimentation: Replace each limiting belief with a positive affirmation.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Mindset shifts support personal growth, leadership, and innovation.
lessons.example: A learner who replaces 'I'm not smart enough' with 'I'm learning fast' builds confidence.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Discovering Passion
lessons.description: Explore your interests and connect them to meaningful opportunities.

instructions.experience: List activities that make you lose track of time.
instructions.reflection: Why do these excite you? What energy do they give you?
instructions.conceptualization: Passion is the fuel that powers careers and enterprises.
instructions.experimentation: Connect one passion to a possible digital or enterprise opportunity.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Passion discovery supports career alignment and entrepreneurial drive.
lessons.example: A learner who loves fixing things may pursue engineering or tech repair.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: From Dream to Vision
lessons.description: Craft a personal vision statement to guide your journey.

instructions.experience: Share your dream with a peer or facilitator.
instructions.reflection: How did they respond? Did it inspire them?
instructions.conceptualization: A vision becomes stronger when shared.
instructions.experimentation: Write a one-sentence vision statement: 'I want to build...'

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Vision crafting is essential for goal setting and enterprise planning.
lessons.example: A learner who writes 'I want to build apps that help farmers' now has a guiding vision.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Welcome & Self-Discovery
lessons.description: Reflect on your strengths and begin your growth journey.

instructions.experience: Write down three personal achievements, however small.
instructions.reflection: How did these moments show your strengths?
instructions.experimentation: Create a 'strengths profile' to guide your journey.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Knowing your strengths helps in career planning and team roles.
lessons.example: A learner who sees they’re good at organizing may pursue project management.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Understanding Maladjustments
lessons.description: Recognize and name the barriers that have held you back.

instructions.experience: Recall a time you felt discouraged or blocked.
instructions.reflection: What emotions did you feel? What patterns do you notice?
instructions.conceptualization: Recognize maladjustments as temporary barriers, not permanent truths.
instructions.experimentation: Write a short plan for how you’ll respond differently next time.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Understanding barriers helps in resilience and emotional intelligence.
lessons.example: A learner who identifies peer pressure as a barrier can build strategies to overcome it.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Reframing & Renewal
lessons.description: Transform past failures into stepping stones for growth.

instructions.experience: Take one past failure and describe it.
instructions.reflection: What did you learn from it?
instructions.conceptualization: Failures are lessons — reframing them unlocks growth.
instructions.experimentation: Rewrite the story of that failure as a stepping stone.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Reframing failure is key in entrepreneurship and innovation.
lessons.example: A learner who failed a test but learned to study better grows stronger.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Passion Ignition
lessons.description: Connect your passions to real-world problems and opportunities.

instructions.experience: Identify one community problem that excites you to solve.
instructions.reflection: Why does this matter to you?
instructions.conceptualization: Passion aligned with community needs creates powerful enterprises.
instructions.experimentation: Draft a simple idea to address the problem.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Passion-driven ideas lead to sustainable enterprises.
lessons.example: A learner who cares about clean water may start a water filtration project.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Resilience & Emotional Balance
lessons.description: Learn how to stay emotionally balanced and resilient through challenges.

instructions.experience: Recall a time you faced stress or failure.
instructions.reflection: How did you cope? What worked, what didn’t?
instructions.conceptualization: Resilience is the ability to bounce back stronger.
instructions.experimentation: Create a personal 'resilience toolkit' (affirmations, coping strategies).

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Emotional balance is essential for leadership and teamwork.
lessons.example: A learner who journals their stress can better manage future challenges.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

lessons.title: Vision to Action
lessons.description: Turn your vision into a simple, actionable roadmap.

instructions.experience: Review your vision statement from Lesson 5.
instructions.reflection: How does it connect to your strengths and passions?
instructions.conceptualization: A vision becomes real when broken into steps.
instructions.experimentation: Draft a 3-step roadmap toward your dream career or enterprise.

lessons.careerHobbyInclination: Roadmapping is a core skill in project management and entrepreneurship.
lessons.example: A learner who maps out steps to start a coding club is ready to lead change.
lessons.northPoleReminder: Every activity here is unlocking your potential to become the digital engineer or entrepreneur you dream of.
lessons.badgeReminder: Keep moving forward — the Visionary Inspirer Badge awaits when you complete all 11 lessons.

finalBadge.badgeMeaning: Learner has awakened dreams, dismantled barriers, ignited passion, and is now ready to inspire others as a digital engineer or entrepreneur.
finalBadge.unlockTrigger: Completion of all 11 lessons with required feedback
